transcript.text: Hello. Living in Lafayette. Vlog. May 15th, 2013. Today, I think I got up at around 8. I got to bed at around 2 or something. I only got like 6 hours of sleep last night, so that's cool. Second night in a row, so I'm not needing that much sleep.
And then I went directly to my computer and started working on my video again, editing it at the Batessa Preserve. It's about halfway uploaded right now.

And yeah, I wanted to do my first biking video. Like, spend as much time on it as I needed. And actually, I didn't spend enough. There's a couple. I wasn't a total perfectionist. There's a couple parts in there, but I mean, it's good.

And so now I have a blueprint to go off of for every other video I do. And, you know, I know how to do it and what to do. I saved a bunch of—I got ahead of myself and I did a bunch of screen captures for other trips.
And I'm not going to do that anymore because, you know, you know the best screen captures to do the best way after you do the trip.
So, but I mean, I have a whole bunch of them already done for like Longs, Evans, Navajo, you know, all these other ones. So, check it out.
But yeah, I'll try to use them as much as I can to save time. But it took me forever. It took me like two days. You know, most of yesterday and most of today.
It's 6.33 now. And yeah, I'm just—I just—after I did that, I did the Souls of Black People video because that's what I listened to yesterday.
And then organized some more because I did have a little bit of organized. I still need to organize my van, but it's raining.
So I think tomorrow I'll do the video—I'll finish organizing my van and do the video like how my house and van organized.
And yeah, and yeah, now I'm like really ready to work, man. Like, yeah, I need to—I don't know. If I can't start working, I might have to start like looking for whatever kind of work.
But yeah, I'm all caught up with my life. I think tomorrow I'm going to hang out in the house all day long because—
Whether it's raining or not because—and I didn't even check the weather, but—
Because I want a day where I spend all day working on my computer and riding the bike on the trailer.
Rollers. I haven't done that yet.
And I have a lot of work on my computer to do, so there's a lot of like request videos people have for me.
Like, they want me to see a video and then do a video about it, so I'll do that tomorrow.
And I also think I want to call—contact all the educational foundations now.
Even though I'm totally like not done yet, I'll just let them know who I am and like what I'm up to and just to do it, you know?
And then of course when I'm done with North Europe, 1500 to 2000, that's when I'll hit them up again, but at least I'll know who I am.
Because sometimes it takes people to think about stuff a while.
Anyways, so—because my dream is to not have to work.
To just work on my timeline and YouTube and then be able to ride, you know, like normal.
Because, you know, work for myself.
That's my dream.
But, I mean, I love window washing.
So I'm looking forward to that.
Yeah, besides I was kind of tired today.
My legs are sore.
And so, yeah, I could do fine.
I did not work on it, not riding.
I didn't work on the video and ride at the same time because I just wanted to concentrate fully on it, you know?
And be relaxed and not feel like I was overworking.
I got drunk this morning because I only drank two beers.
It was the big beers too.
I got like six big beers for like $5.50.
And I had two.
So then I had—last night, so I had four today.
And that was interesting.
That was cool.
Be all like that and work it on my video.
But I'm happy with it.
Just check it out.
I broke a record.
I won one of the segments on Strava.
I won one of the downhills.
Because I'm so heavy, probably.
And I was on a 26-inch wheel.
Maybe it's faster for those.
I don't know.
Because all the mountain bike wheels are 29-inch now.
Like, you know, in the bike shop, they're all 29.
Yeah, those came up fast, man.
A couple years ago.
I think nobody knew about them.
So, yeah.
But yeah, I rode one in the race a couple years ago.
And they are better.
It's just interesting that it took them so long to figure that out.
Like 30 years.
But the guy who invented the 29, Gary Fisher, was the guy who invented mountain bikes.
It's interesting.
Anyways.
So, yeah.
So now I'm going to go on the computer.
I'm going to sit down.
I was thinking about stretching.
I think, also tomorrow, I think I want to start the day with lifting weights.
And then stretch.
And then riding the bike and the trailer all day long.
Roller all day long.
But right now, I'm going to go on the computer.
I was looking at watching videos on how to decipher Google Analytics.
I've never done that.
I want to start getting a little bit into the marketing site on my website.
And, yeah.
Just catch him on that.
And maybe get a battle plan going for the news.
Because I want to start doing news with Kyle every day, too.
Make a routine out of that.
So, yeah.
That's what I did today.
Peace out.
Oops.
There's a couple of things I forgot to say.
Okay.
One of them is I got a couple of donations for the first time in like six, eight months.
Like a couple of weeks ago, I got a donation for $5 from an Australian from PAX Imports.
And then yesterday from a Canadian.
Some dude from Poland.
I don't know.
Something like that.
But a Canadian.
Ten bucks.
So, that's cool.
Also, I'm not going to do videos on my bike anymore like I said I was going to.
I think that's a little bit multi-task overkill.
Because I have plenty of time to run on my bike and work on my computer.
I don't need to make videos.
Even though it will help motivate me to make videos.
People can concentrate on me better if I'm just sitting here talking.
You know, with nothing in the background.
And just my face and shoulders and like that.
Yeah.
So, okay.
That's all.
